docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM LIEN FILED BY PETITIONER DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY AS TRUSTEE FOR WAMU MORTGAGE PASS-THROUGH CERTIFICATE SERIES 2005-AR6 BY AND THROUGH SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC., AS SERVICING AGENT AND ATTORNEY-IN-FACT HEARING SET FOR NOV-29-2017 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PETITIONER DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY'S HEARING ON PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM LIEN IS GRANTED. MOVING PARTY MET THE REQUIREMENTS OF CC 8490 ET SEQ. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE LYNN O'MALLEY-TAYLOR, CLERK: A. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien
Off Calendar Nov-29-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY's Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien is GRANTED. Moving party met the requirements of CC 8490 et seq. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Lynn O'Malley-Taylor, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)
